2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.0.3 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3032.issue: [S3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v1.0.3" was found for current release 1.0.3. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5049.issue: [E5049] process.env is used in source files (main.js). process.env is incompatible with compact mode. Please use adapter configuration instead.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#53] "[iobroker-bot] Align @tsconfig/nodeXX with engines.node in [package.json](https://github.com/Rello/ioBroker.nextcloudtalk/blob/master/package.json)"](https://github.com/Rello/ioBroker.nextcloudtalk/issues/53)

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/Rello/ioBroker.nextcloudtalk/blob/master/package.json)

0082.issue: [S0082] Package "@tsconfig/node20" (devDependencies) can be updated from 20.1.4 to 20.1.9. The newer version has been published for 111 days. Please evaluate updating [package.json](https://github.com/Rello/ioBroker.nextcloudtalk/blob/master/package.json).

0087.issue: [S0087] Missing "/tsconfig.json". Consider adding it for proper type checking (see ioBroker.examples for examples).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/Rello/ioBroker.nextcloudtalk/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/Rello/ioBroker.nextcloudtalk/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.

0086.issue: [W0086] "@tsconfig/node20" should match the major node.js version from [package.json](https://github.com/Rello/ioBroker.nextcloudtalk/blob/master/package.json) engines.node (>=22). Please update to @tsconfig/node22 at [package.json](https://github.com/Rello/ioBroker.nextcloudtalk/blob/master/package.json).
